prompt.description: Task for the agent. Free-form text.

agent.description: Agent provider. 'claude-code' (default) or 'codex' (OpenAI Codex CLI, experimental). Defaults to 'claude-code'.

model.description: Model for the agent. Provider-specific: claude-code uses 'opus', 'sonnet' (default), or 'haiku'; codex uses the gpt-5.x family.

preamble.description: Optional prose prepended verbatim to the generated agent context file (e.g. CLAUDE.md for claude-code) before the auto-generated environment section.

egress.description: Additional outbound network policy. 'none' (default) means only the vendor proxy; 'package-managers' also allows npm/PyPI/conda registries. 'open' is rejected.

files.description: Host file paths to mount read-only into /in/<basename>. Each path must be absolute and inside DEMESNE_ALLOWED_PATHS.

directories.description: Host directory paths to mount read-only into /in/<basename>. Each path must be absolute and inside DEMESNE_ALLOWED_PATHS.
